name: Execution of Temporary Files Via Office Application
description: Detects the execution of a file with a `.tmp` extension by an Office application (Word, PowerPoint, Excel). This behavior is suspicious and can indicate an attempt to execute malicious code disguised as a temporary file.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the Office application that launched the temporary file (e.g., 'winword.exe', 'powerpnt.exe', 'excel.exe').

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the executed process, ending with '.tmp'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the temporary file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
